```
Time Allowed -> 1.5 Hrs

PAGE NO. 1

FR - Portionwise Test - 2

Q2:- Calculation of Borrowing cost to be capitalised:-

-> Specific Borrowing 65000
(-) Interest earned 20000 45000

-> General Borrowings
1000000 x 11% x 9/12 82500
1200000 x 11% x 3/12 33000 41250
Total Borrowing cost to be capitalised 86250

WN1:- Calculation of Capitalisation Rate [General Borrowings]:-

Weighted average Interest [Total] x 100
Weighted average Borrowings [Total]

=> [1000000 x 12.5%] + [500000 x 10%] x 12/12 x 100
1000000 (+) 500000

=> 11%

Q3:- (i) Purchase Consideration 1320000
(-) Net Assets Value 1000000
Goodwill 320000

As per Ind AS 38 Goodwill is never amortised, it is only tested for
Impairment.
```

Qy4: Incorrect Computation of Goodwill:-

Purchase Consideration 25000
(+) Previously held Investment 9000
(-) Identifiable net Assets 30000
Goodwill 4000

Journal Entry :- ① INA A/c Dr. 30000
Goodwill A/c Dr. 4000
To purchase cons. 25000
To Prev. held invt. 9000

② Prev. held investment A/c Dr. 150
To P/L A/c [gain] 150

③ Revaluation Reserve A/c Dr. 50
To Retained earnings 50

④ Exchange difference A/c Dr. 100
To P/L A/c 100

concept :- when associate becomes subsidiary, items of other equity are reclassified.

Q5:- As per Ind AS 10, Events that occurred after reporting period but before the approval of financial statements & condition of which exist on balance sheet date are considered as Adjusting Event.

condition:
Here the law suit was present at Balance sheet date settlement to which happened after 31st March but before approval of Financial Statements.

Spiral

therefore it is considered as an Adjusting event & effect of which will be given in financial statements.

The accountant should make provision for 10 lakhs on Balance sheet
∴ The Treatment of accountant of not recording in Financial Statement was wrong.

Q6 (i) The manufacturing unit can be classified as Held for sale on 31 July 20X1.

(ii) Carrying amount on 31 July 20X1 2600
Fair Value less cost to sell on 31 July 20X1 1750 1850 - 100?
Impairment loss as per 105 850

(iii) on year end 31 dec X1:-
on year end The disposal group will be measured at carrying amount or Fair value at cost to sell, whichever is lower.

Q1:- Building A :- Building B :-
Cost 10cr Cost 2 crores
Θ dep for 5 yrs 2.5cr Θ dep 0.05 cr.
[10/20yrs x 5 yrs] [2 crores/40 yrs]
Value on 31/3 eor1 7.5 cr. Value on 31/3/x2 1.95 cr.
Θ dep 0.5
Value on 31/3/20X2 7cr.

Spiral

Sure, here is the extracted handwritten text from the image:

```
WN1: Calculation of depreciation:-

Land 100 lakhs
[Not depreciable]

Building: [99.125 - 100]
   ➔ Roof [30%] ➔ 29.7375 [99.125 x 30%]
   ➔ depreciation 0.4956

   [29.7375 x 1 x 4]
   [          20     12]
   ➔ 29.2419

   ➔ 70% Building ➔ 69.3875
   ➔ depreciation 0.5782

   [69.3875 x 1 x 4]
   [          40     12]
   ➔ 68.8093

Total depreciation = 0.4956 (+) 0.5782
   ➔ 1.0738
```
